# Chapter 10: Space infrastructure: orbital and planetary engineering  (~100 pp)
- 10.1 Orbital mechanics for engineers (12) · 10.2 Launch systems and propulsion (12) · 10.3 Satellites: design, lifetime, end-of-life (15) · 10.4 Constellation engineering: Starlink, Galileo, GPS, OneWeb (15) · 10.5 Communications and earth observation (12) · 10.6 Crewed spaceflight and space stations (12) · 10.7 Mars and lunar engineering: Artemis, ISRU (10) · 10.8 Space debris and orbital sustainability (8) · 10.9 Failure section: launch failures, in-orbit losses, mission failures, Kessler-syndrome risk (4)

**Archetype**: scaling, control, failure. **Project**: spec a CubeSat-class mission end to end (one-week effort, no build); document orbit, payload, link budget, end-of-life plan. **Exercises**: 22.
